shared_properties: Core prisoner silhouette with shackles and tunic hem.
Nearest-neighbor pixel treatment and 1 px outline.
differences: Torso compresses and the head snaps backward.
A red flash band crosses the torso and upper legs.
Animation does not loop and plays at 12 fps.

reference_images.label: slip_down_moodboard
reference_images.purpose: Dungeon shaft palette, cold stone texture, vertical pressure mood, and obstacle rhythm anchor.

reference_images.label: slip_down_player
reference_images.purpose: Prisoner silhouette, fall pose, cloth volume, and shackle readability anchor.

bevy_constraints.bundle_strategy: Use SpriteSheetBundle for the short hit state and restore the active movement atlas after the invulnerability timer begins.
bevy_constraints.asset_loading: Load character/player_prisoner_hit_2f_12fps.png through AssetServer and play it as a non-looping atlas on damage.
runtime_notes: This state plays once at 12 fps and then returns to fall or brake animation.
The hurt flash pairs with a 1.5 second invulnerability timer controlled outside the atlas.
The pivot matches the base state so knockback-free damage remains visually stable.

context.usage: Damage state triggered by spikes or saw contact, with a compressed pose and a hot flash that reads during the invulnerability window.

shape.silhouette: Compressed prisoner silhouette with a backward head snap, lifted knees, and a hot red flash band across the torso.

appendages.accessories: Ankle shackles and a waist chain.

specs.texture: Shared tunic folds with a saturated red hit flash overlay.
specs.shading: Flat pixel shading with one-frame flash emphasis.

acceptance_criteria: Sprite sheet is exactly 32x24 px with two 16x24 frames.
Red flash coverage occupies at least 20 percent of the torso area in frame 1.
The hit pose keeps the feet inside the base 16 px frame width.
